findings.signal: Repo `repos/private/cortex-app` does not exist, but PRD references it as repoPath. Project is in READY status but blocked on repo creation. PRD created 2026-03-10, now 3+ days old without execution.
findings.recommended_action: Create `repos/private/cortex-app` repo and initialize from PRD scaffolding. Or start `/execute-task cortex-app/US-001` to scaffold Tauri app and trigger repo creation.

findings.signal: Settings directory is empty. Company has no API keys, credential configs, or environment setup. Expected: .env file with Claude API key, potential Stripe/YouTube/analytics credentials.
findings.recommended_action: Populate with .env template after repo creation. Required before running agent brain (US-005).

findings.signal: No company-scoped policies defined. Standard policies (credential-access-protocol, agent-action-sandboxing, api-cost-limits) should exist for a company running autonomous agents.
findings.recommended_action: Create company policies post-repo-setup. Consider: agent action sandboxing rules, API cost budgets, credential storage requirements.

findings.signal: Data exports directory is empty. No exported agent runs, KPI datasets, or activity feeds. Normal for a pre-execution company.
findings.recommended_action: Will populate after first agent cycle runs. No action needed — this is expected.

findings.signal: README describes company as scaffolded but references 'Repos: None yet.' and 'Workers: None yet.' which are accurate but the cortex-app project is now a primary deliverable and should be mentioned.
findings.recommended_action: Update README to reference cortex-app project post-repo-creation, or leave as-is until project is underway.

details.discrepancy: cortex-app project exists in projects/ but not mentioned in README

findings.signal: Thread file is 3 days old (created 2026-03-10, today 2026-03-13). Session completed with next_steps documented but no follow-up execution initiated. Thread is still active (not >60d old) but eligible for archival after execution begins.
findings.recommended_action: Execute `/run-project cortex-app` or `/execute-task cortex-app/US-001` to move project forward, then archive thread.

summary.notes: Cortex company is recently scaffolded (2026-03-10) with PRD complete and structured. Primary blocker is creation of `repos/private/cortex-app` to enable execution. No stale content. Supporting infrastructure (settings, policies, data dirs) is appropriately empty pre-execution. Recommended next action: `/execute-task cortex-app/US-001` to begin Tauri app scaffolding.
